title: Dashboard - Goals Widget
excerpt: Dashboard widget Goals - Beta. I need information from a formula column with this widget but the formula columns do not come up in the dropdown. When I go to the dropdown “Pick column to track as goal” to select a column…

posts.author: TracyField (Tracy Field)
posts.cookedHtml:
Dashboard widget Goals - Beta. I need information from a formula column with this widget but the formula columns do not come up in the dropdown. When I go to the dropdown “Pick column to track as goal” to select a column, none of my formula columns are available.

Most revenue columns and other financial goals calculations come from formula columns. This would have to be one of the first things to include in a goals column.

posts.author: Michael55 (Michael Alacqua)
posts.cookedHtml: I’m having the same problem. I’ve even tried creating a new number column hoping I could use AI to auto populate. But again, the formula fields don’t appear in the selection in the AI menu.

posts.author: BruceGosk (Bruce Gosk)
posts.cookedHtml:
If you are open to using Apps then you should be able to Cast a result to the numbers column using the General Caster app.
